generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we had to wait for hours during the 2024 blackout? Imagine if that had been an attack. Our local security agencies need better tools to act fast when we're at risk. Some worry about civil liberties, but we can't afford to be unprepared. Our safety comes first. #CommunityFirst #SecurityMatters
